summary: Comprehensive testing completed for AgentForge v2.3 features. All 4 new features (Custom Quick Actions, Agent Memory Persistence, Project Duplication, Multi-file Refactoring) fully functional. Backend: 24/24 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All v2.3 dialogs and interactions working correctly.

issues: Console warnings about missing aria-describedby for DialogContent - minor accessibility improvement needed

passed_tests: ✅ API Root - v2.3.0 with all 11 features listed
✅ Agents CRUD - GET /api/agents returns 6 agents (COMMANDER, ATLAS, FORGE, SENTINEL, PROBE, PRISM)
✅ Quick Actions - GET /api/quick-actions returns 8 predefined actions
✅ Frontend - Dashboard loads with 6 agents and project grid
✅ Frontend - ProjectWorkspace loads with all v2.3 features
✅ Frontend - Refactor dialog opens with Find & Replace option
✅ Frontend - Memory dialog opens with Extract Memories button
✅ Frontend - Duplicate dialog opens with name input
✅ Frontend - Custom Action creation dialog works
✅ Frontend - Quick Actions panel displays 8 actions
✅ Frontend - All 6 agents selectable in header
critical_code_review_comments: DialogContent components have missing aria-describedby causing console warnings - add aria-describedby={description-id} prop
Some TypeScript/PropTypes warnings could be addressed for better type safety
seed_data_creation: Test projects created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: AgentForge v2.3 is fully tested. All new features working: Custom Quick Actions (CRUD + execute), Agent Memory (CRUD + auto-extract), Project Duplication (with file copying), Multi-file Refactoring (preview + apply). The test file /app/backend/tests/test_v23_features.py covers all v2.3 endpoints and can be reused for regression testing.
